description: Change the playback tempo. Applies a rate multiplier to the scheduler (clamped to [0.25, 4]) so events fire proportionally faster or slower, and forwards the new BPM to MidiClockGenerator for external gear synced via MIDI Clock. Accepts `bpm` (preferred) or `tempo` as the payload key. Returns the effective BPM after clamping plus the resulting rate and the file's original tempo.

cases.name: no payload — falls back to current tempo
invalid bpm — success:false with unchanged state
